title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Anthony F. Genuino to Enter Into Contract for Service of Mr. Marlon H. Nabia As a Para - Teacher ( LEARNING SUPPORT AIDE) with Corresponding Monthly Compensation of Fifteen Thousand Pesos (P 15,000.00) Chargeable Against the Special Education Fund Effective July to December 2022. (AUTHOR :COUNCILWOMAN LEREN MAE M. BAUTISTA, 8/01/2022)
